summary: Iteration 19 - DISTRIBUTION ENGINE + TRADER EVOLUTION + STRATEGY CREATOR testing complete. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 3 new features tested successfully - Share Cards with social sharing, Trader Evolution Path with 8 levels, Strategy Creator 4-step wizard.
passed_tests: API health check - operational
Login with test@test.com/test - success
GET /api/distribution/card/score - returns score card with tier, win_rate, trades, share_text
GET /api/distribution/card/performance - returns performance card with total_pnl, best_trade, aureos_score, share_text
GET /api/distribution/evolution - returns current level, next level, progress, all 8 levels
Evolution endpoint: 8 levels from Novice to Legendary with min_score/min_trades requirements
Evolution levels correctly show is_current, is_unlocked, is_locked status
POST /api/advantage/strategies/create - creates strategy with name, description, rules, asset_class, timeframe, risk_level
Shared card retrieval via GET /api/distribution/card/{card_id}
Score/Performance card requires authentication (401 without token)
Dashboard still loads correctly with new sidebar items
Language selector (PT dropdown in header) works correctly with 9 languages
Frontend: Share Cards page loads with Score Card and Performance Card
Frontend: Score Card shows tier (Advanced), win rate (86%), trades (5)
Frontend: Performance Card shows P&L (+$2,625), best trade (+$2500), score (612)
Frontend: Twitter, WhatsApp, Copy share buttons work on both cards
Frontend: Copy button shows 'Copied!' toast and state change
Frontend: Trader Evolution page shows current level (Level 2: Apprentice)
Frontend: Progress bar shows 75% to next level (Trader)
Frontend: All 8 evolution levels displayed with correct names
Frontend: Locked levels appear dimmed (opacity-50), unlocked levels show check icon
Frontend: Strategy Creator shows 4-step wizard (Name, Configuration, Rules, Review)
Frontend: Step 1 validation - name >= 3 chars, description >= 10 chars required
Frontend: Step 2 - Asset class (all/stocks/crypto/forex), Timeframe (1H-1M), Risk level (low/moderate/high)
Frontend: Step 3 - Add/remove rules functionality works
Frontend: Step 4 - Review shows all data, Publish button works
Frontend: Publishing strategy shows 'Strategy Published!' success state
Frontend: Sidebar shows new items (Share Cards, Evolution, Create Strategy) in Unfair Advantage section
critical_code_review_comments: Distribution Engine endpoints use JWT auth correctly with _extract_user_id helper
Share cards store in shared_cards collection with unique card_id for public retrieval
Evolution system has 8 levels: Novice (0 score/0 trades) to Legendary (950 score/200 trades)
Strategy Creator publishes to POST /api/advantage/strategies/create (in unfair_advantage.py)
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for UI testing
Progress calculation uses average of score_progress and trade_progress
i18n working correctly - sidebar labels in Portuguese (PT default)
seed_data_creation: Created test strategy via Strategy Creator wizard during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19 added 3 new features: 1) Distribution Engine with shareable Intelligence Cards (Score Card, Performance Card) at /share-cards - includes Twitter, WhatsApp, Copy share buttons. Cards are stored in shared_cards collection. 2) Trader Evolution Path at /evolution - 8 levels from Novice to Legendary, each with min_score and min_trades requirements. Shows current level, progress bar, unlocked features. 3) Strategy Creator Wizard at /strategy-creator - 4-step wizard (Name & Description, Configuration, Rules, Review & Publish). Validation: Step 1 needs name >= 3 chars + description >= 10 chars, Step 3 needs at least 1 non-empty rule. Publishes to POST /api/advantage/strategies/create. All endpoints require authentication. Sidebar shows new items in 'Unfair Advantage' section. Language selector still works (PT default).

mocked_components.note: NO MOCKED APIS - All endpoints use real MongoDB
real_integrations: Score Card: Real user data from paper_trades and score_history collections
Performance Card: Real P&L calculations from paper_trades collection
Evolution: Real score and trades count determines level
Strategy Creator: Real strategy creation in strategies collection

rca_of_the_issue: N/A - No issues found. All Distribution Engine + Trader Evolution + Strategy Creator features working correctly.
